title: Phase 2 → Phase 3 Handoff

frozen_lanes.title: Cross-Cutting IPC Reliability
frozen_lanes.claims_verified: 9/10 pass (1 intentional — empty command validation moved to dialog)
critical_fixes: handleSave now awaits onSave (no more fire-and-forget)
addMutation persists to electron-store (no more data loss on restart)
SDK-first write order prevents stale store overwrites

frozen_lanes.title: MCP Management Crash Fixes
critical_fixes: addMutation now persists to electron-store (P0 data loss fixed)
handleEdit constructs stub entry from sync.data.mcp when store missing
DialogEditMcp no longer nested Dialog — no more portal conflict

frozen_lanes.title: Agent Config Crash Fixes
frozen_lanes.test_delta: 0 new tests (validation extracted to shared module)
critical_fixes: Serial write queue prevents save race (CRITICAL — prev captured at call time)
Dedicated delete IPC handler instead of full-list re-save
handleSave now has try/catch with user-visible error toast
temperature/top_p input locale-safe (comma→dot) and validated server-side

frozen_lanes.title: MCP Management Hardening
critical_fixes: Per-server Semaphore with 30s timeout serializes connect/disconnect/watch
Double-toast bug fixed (single error surface in toggle mutation)
ErrorBoundary now shows error.message instead of silently swallowing
Empty command and URL validation before save

frozen_lanes.title: Agent Config Hardening
critical_fixes: handleSave is async, awaits onSave (no more fire-and-forget)
Locale-safe Number(value.replace(',','.')) for temperature/top_p
isSaving guard prevents double-save, button shows Spinner during async
Dialog stays open on save failure — user can retry without losing inputs

frozen_lanes.title: Plugin Management Hardening
critical_fixes: All 7 store IPC handlers wrapped in try/catch (was 3/7 — repair added the rest)
ALL window.api calls use ?.() optional chaining (was 5/9 — repair added 4)
toggleEnabled/removePlugin now fetch fresh state before mutating (was using stale local signal)

frozen_lanes.title: GitHub Integration Hardening
critical_fixes: GitHub IPC handlers extracted to github-ipc.ts (503-line ipc.ts reduced)
PAT format validation added (ghp_, github_pat_, ghu_, gho_, ghb_ prefixes)
API proxy error serialization fixed (structured return, not JSON.stringify'd Error)
GitHubService wired into AppLayer (was dead code — 0 callers)
Cache TTL fixed (Duration.zero → Duration.hours(1))
github.noAuth i18n key now shown when no token

frozen_lanes.title: Subagent Delegation UX
critical_fixes: Group headers in slash-popover (Agents, Delegates, Recent Files, Files)
Rank collision fixed (agent=0, delegate=0.5 — was both 0)
Delegate pills now have data-subagent attribute
@mention supports subagent type (was only agent + file)

frozen_lanes.title: Context Display Fixes
critical_fixes: Tooltip now shows 'X% of context window' instead of bare 'X%'

integration_blockers.description: ipc.ts has contributions from 5 lanes (1, 2, 4, 6, 7) — serializedWrite generic constraint at line 71 may surface after merge
integration_blockers.recommended_action: Run full typecheck on merged ipc.ts before releasing

integration_blockers.description: Pre-existing TS2304 error in dialog-manage-agents.tsx (writeQueue not in scope) — Lane 3 added writeQueue but dialog-manage-agents may have stale type references
integration_blockers.recommended_action: Verify dialog-manage-agents.tsx typecheck after all lanes merged

integration_blockers.description: Pre-existing TS2339 in cli.ts (installCli orphan) — Lane 1 removed dead preload code but renderer has stale reference
integration_blockers.recommended_action: Remove or stub the cli.ts reference

integration_blockers.description: Dirty files were preserved — home.tsx, layout.tsx, plugin-context.tsx, plugin-loader.ts, account.sql.ts, mcp/index.ts may have unstaged changes from parallel lanes
integration_blockers.recommended_action: Review all dirty files before merge for unintended interactions

deferred_work: 7 additional fire-and-forget promise sites across codebase (dynamic imports, webview-zoom)
Dialog component tests (SolidJS testing harness — zero coverage today)
i18n github.* keys across all 17 locale files (only en.ts has them)
Unify agent filter pipelines (@mention vs composer dropdown — different exclusion criteria)
Desktop account management UI to hook into existing githubClearToken infrastructure
